title: Payment retry loses idempotency key
description: A retry generates a new charge identity.
requirement: REQ-RETRY-1: Retrying a failed payment must reuse the original idempotency key.
seededViolation: The retry creates a random key for every charge.
whyItMatters: One invoice can be charged more than once.

expectedFindings.title: Payment retry generates a new idempotency key
expectedFindings.description: A fresh key permits a duplicate charge for the invoice.

distractors.reasonNotAnIssue: The retry cannot charge a non-existent invoice.
